name: doctor --check vuln-scan blocks (exit 1) on a critical dependency finding via the same exit-code contract
command:
printf '{"dependencies":{"lodash":"4.17.20"}}' > package.json && printf '%b' '- component: lodash
  affected: 4.17.20
  severity: critical
  fixed_in: 4.17.21
  advisory_id: GHSA-x
  source: cisa-kev
' > adv.yaml && ADVISORIES=adv.yaml bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check vuln-scan --root . 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' e.txt && echo x10-blocks-critical 1>&2
